title: leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. spathulifolia
intro: Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. spathulifolia, commonly known as pale alpine daisy or pale mountain daisy, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. spathulifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
